mail.game_hall.body: The Game Hall can host Fishing sessions. Try one when the town is quiet.
notice.creator_alpha.subject: Creator alpha prep
notice.creator_alpha.body: Official minigames define the first upload contract before player-made games open.
notice.housing_beta.subject: Housing build test
notice.housing_beta.body: Starter furniture uses the same coin sink that will support the live economy.
world.session_invite_chat_format: {name} is hosting {game}. Join from the room panel.
world.session_invite_chip_tooltip: Join the latest room minigame invite.
world.panel.action.creator: Creator
world.panel.creator.title: Creator Lab
world.panel.creator.detail: Pick a mode first. Each upload still uses IMinigame, SubViewport sandboxing, manifest validation, and review.
creator.contract.manifest.detail: meta.json must include game_id, version, author, mode_id, en/ja/zh name, player range, runtime_contract, entry scene, main script, and asset budget.
creator.contract.manifest.title: Manifest Contract
creator.contract.security.detail: No OS, filesystem, raw network, root-node access, or external APIs. Assets must stay as pixel PNG/WebP within the package budget.
creator.contract.security.title: Sandbox Review
creator.submission.draft.title: Draft Review Probe
creator.submission.status.offline: Draft check is waiting for backend connection.
creator.package.status.offline: Package upload is waiting for backend connection.
creator.package.title: Package Intake Probe

creator.reviewer.title: Review Signals
creator.status.detail_format: Versions: {versions} · Latest: v{version} · {status} · Scan {scan} · AI {ai} · Install {install}
creator.status.offline: History is waiting for backend connection.
creator.status.title: Creator Status Page
reviewer.console.confirm_required_format: Click {action} again to confirm this high-risk action.
reviewer.console.detail: Human review, install, rollback, and unpublish controls.
reviewer.console.note_placeholder: Action note for rollback or unpublish
reviewer.console.note_required: Action note required for rollback or unpublish.

chat_reports.console.detail: Open player chat reports and first-pass moderation actions.
chat_reports.console.title: Chat Reports
moderation.console.detail: Active chat restrictions and recent operator actions.
moderation.console.missing_target: This moderation action is missing a target player.
moderation.console.title: Moderation Audit
ops.console.detail: Room, chat, realtime, and reward counters.
ops.console.row.realtime: Realtime: {a} delivered · {b} move limits · {c} emote limits
ops.console.row.room_detail: {room} · {type} · {connected} connected · {snapshot} snapshot · WS {delivered}/{target} · slow {slow} · failed {failed} · {age}s ago
ops.console.title: Debug Ops
liveops.console.ready: Creator review and chat moderation are available.
liveops.console.ready_role_format: LiveOps ready · role {role} · risky actions require confirmation.
liveops.console.role_format: Admin role: {role}. Risky actions require confirmation.
liveops.console.title: LiveOps Console
creator.mode.2d_fighting.name: 2D Fighting
creator.mode.2d_fighting.summary: Side-view duels or small team fights with hitboxes, hurtboxes, input buffers, combo rules, and round timers.
creator.mode.battle_royale.name: Battle Royale
creator.mode.battle_royale.summary: Elimination sessions with shrinking zones, light loot, and server authority from the start.
creator.mode.casual_activity.name: Casual Activity
creator.mode.casual_activity.summary: Small social games like fishing, matching, rhythm taps, or festival booths.
creator.mode.rpg_adventure.name: RPG Adventure
creator.mode.rpg_adventure.summary: Top-down quests, light combat, dialogue, and co-op room moments.
creator.mode.side_scroller_2d.name: Side-Scrolling 2D
creator.mode.side_scroller_2d.summary: Pixel action stages with platforms, enemies, hazards, and bounded 2D cameras.
creator.mode.strategy_war.name: War Strategy
creator.mode.strategy_war.summary: Grid or isometric unit command games with deterministic turns or locked ticks.
creator.mode.tower_defense.name: Tower Defense
creator.mode.tower_defense.summary: Wave defense games with path grids, tower placement, upgrades, and reward pacing.
world.title: Town Square
